return(function(...)local y={"\066\100\068\090\109\049\072\066\078\053\084\106\066\118\077\067","\071\118\055\087\074\078\114\117";"\113\118\047\100\066\107\061\061","\066\056\052\054\066\056\051\099";"\085\070\057\061";"\066\117\076\099\113\080\061\061";"\073\053\080\114\048\099\111\099\074\121\100\053\055\051\109\104";"\066\056\077\077\071\107\061\061";"\082\100\052\089\085\049\055\076\086\075\061\061";"\055\119\077\078\103\053\071\061","\109\053\051\105\085\053\120\061","\071\053\047\077\085\053\097\061";"\113\049\072\098\085\118\057\061";"\113\082\111\087\085\118\057\061";"\080\056\109\047\048\056\047\103\113\051\057\099\071\120\111\057\047\075\061\061","\068\070\100\115\118\121\069\085\075\105\097\109\108\088\085\080\100\104\108\075\069\097\061\061","\113\056\051\122\113\080\061\061","\073\118\089\068\078\102\109\078\071\056\052\118\113\053\114\116";"\071\056\073\099\085\078\073\099\066\082\055\077\066\049\072\076","\109\053\052\116\109\119\111\089\085\049\071\061","\071\049\073\122\085\118\113\076","\113\056\100\077\109\053\047\081";"\080\121\114\066\103\120\051\081","\108\107\061\061","";"\085\053\073\054";"\103\119\055\099\071\104\109\076\109\075\061\061","\086\070\111\114\074\049\066\116\071\117\076\054\113\121\113\120\074\080\061\061";"\066\117\065\077\077\098\072\100\107\079\107\084\066\086\104\086\097\052\051\089\116\075\061\061","\097\057\101\102\075\109\066\083\077\106\057\056","\086\104\073\072\055\056\114\073\102\119\111\079\108\104\122\074\109\107\061\061","\071\078\097\114","\071\120\052\111\066\117\111\098\102\073\109\056\108\078\109\070\086\053\107\061";"\073\053\051\122\071\053\073\087\057\104\055\076\109\053\073\065\109\053\073\121\057\080\061\061","\113\056\073\099\113\056\073\054\109\107\061\061","\108\105\107\076\113\101\081\089\108\107\061\061";"\049\070\082\066\054\105\082\088\065\105\074\108\067\110\072\078\049\079\106\101\087\055\084\102\118\107\061\061","\082\100\052\084\113\078\106\061";"\103\056\055\098\113\078\072\087\102\116\111\056\078\120\122\098\055\078\1 return(function(y,J,u,q,U,m,l,I,j,b,W,Z,K,O,n,e,x,d,P,o,N)x,d,I,N,P,n,e,o,Z,K,O,b,j,W=function(y,Y)local J=K(Y)local u=function()return W(y,{},Y,J)end return u end,function(y,Y)local J=K(Y)local u=function(u,q,U)return W(y,{u,q;U},Y,J)end return u end,function(y,Y)local J=K(Y)local u=function(u,q,U,m,l)return W(y,{u;q,U,m,l},Y,J)end return u end,function(y,Y)local J=K(Y)local u=function(...)return W(y,{...},Y,J)end return u end,function(y,Y)local J=K(Y)local u=function(u,q,U,m)return W(y,{u,q,U,m},Y,J)end return u end,{},function(y,Y)local J=K(Y)local u=function(u,q)return W(y,{u;q},Y,J)end return u end,function(y)local Y,W=474319-(((-1507248-(-636931))+1852602)+-507967),y[907189-907188]while W do n[W],Y=n[W]-(-111328-(-111329)),(494997-494996)+Y if Y=-283412-(-283413),#y,(-654737+-205067)+859805 do n[y[Y]]=(-290451-(-290452))+n[y[Y]]end if u then local W=u(true)local q({},{[Y(-327870-(-319859))]=o,[Y(-133257+125262)]=y,[Y(-1052050-(-1044032))]=function()return 2322481-(-41959)end})end
